message:
refactor(io): improve async IO operations and extensions

Core IO (buf_reader, buf_writer, copy, read, read_buf, split, write, write_permit):
- Improve buffered IO with better cancel-safety
- Enhanced copy operations with proper cleanup
- Better read_buf integration

IO extensions (read_ext, write_ext):
- Improve extension trait implementations
- Better async read/write helpers

lines.rs:
- Improve async line iteration

These changes ensure IO operations properly integrate with asupersync's
structured concurrency, providing cancel-safe reads and writes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
